sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt2 = 0 and amt4 = 0 and amt5 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '3%' and (TTY = '100' or not GL like '%2') and not GL = '3584005'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1621502','2421502','2850500')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '1050000' and GL < '1090000'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = '(2) Elim' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2998','2999')
update TransX set Flex3 = '(1) Co2Co' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Co' + Co + ' Tp' + TP from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = Descr, Flex4 = Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'GL Grp 4'
update TransX set Flex1 = Descr, Flex4 = Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'GL Grp 4'
update TransX set TPname = '', Flex3 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = Descr, TPname = Field2 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Contract = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'HUD_STM_Contracts' and Co <> '2008'

update TransX set Flex3 = Descr, TPname = ID from TransX inner join (select min(Descr) as Descr, min(ID) as ID, Field2 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'HUD_STM_Contracts' group by Field2) a on Contract = Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Co = '2008'
update TransX set Amt1 = round(Amt2-Amt5,2), Amt3 = round(Amt2-Amt4,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt2 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '4000000'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0 and amt3 = 0
update TransX set Flex1 = '02 RCR & ALAE' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('02 RCR','04 ALAE')
update TransX set Flex1 = '26 Chg RCR & ALAE' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('26 Chg RCR','28 Chg ALAE')
update TransX set Flex3 = 'e - Healthcare' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (PC like '40401%' or PC = '4060100156')
update TransX set Flex3 = 'a - 70% QS' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (PC like '40401%' or PC = '4060100156') and Flex3 = 'e - Healthcare'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'g - FIRV', Tpname = '800' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract like 'FV-%'

update TransX set TPname = Field2 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Contract = ID and Co = Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'HUD_STM_Contracts' and Co <> '2008' and Flex3 = 'a - 70% QS' and Contract like 'P%-QS%'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'a - 70% QS' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4050609161' and Flex3 = ''
update TransX set Flex3 = 'a - 70% QS' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4070100134' and Flex3 = ''
update TransX set Flex3 = 'e - Healthcare' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and  Flex3 = 'a - 70% QS' and Co = '2008' and TP in ('2300','2400') and UWYR = '9999'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'a - 70% QS' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4050309012' and Flex3 = ''
update TransX set Flex3 = 'i - D&H 267' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC in ('4050100267','1402000755') and Flex3 = 'i - D&H'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'k - unknown' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('12 Inter-Co','54 Suspense','94 FX RGLOE')
update TransX set Flex3 = 'a - 70% QS' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = '08 Cont Comm' and Flex3 = '' and UWYR > '2010'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'b - 70% QS old' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = '08 Cont Comm' and Flex3 = ''

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, PC, UWYR, Amt2,Amt4,Amt5) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',
